description: Letter addressed to Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm b. Natan al-Sabīʿī (aka Avraham b. Natan ha-Sheviʿi). The sender's name may include Yosef. Only the address is preserved on verso and only the top half of the first line is preserved on recto.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
